body_preview:
Hi Laura,

Thanks again for the kickoff call. Our team is excited to have you on the spring private-label refresh. I've set up a Box folder for the brand assets and will add you as an external collaborator this week. Could you send over your standard vendor onboarding form and a rough timeline for the logo system?

Best,
Diane
subject: Beacon private-label refresh - kickoff follow-up

body_preview:
Hi Diane,

Great to meet the team. Onboarding form attached. For the logo system I'd plan four weeks: week one for discovery and moodboards, two for primary mark concepts, three for refinement, four for the secondary marks and a starter brand sheet. I'll work straight from the Box folder once I'm added.

Looking forward to it,
Laura
subject: RE: Beacon private-label refresh - kickoff follow-up

body_preview:
Laura,

You're added to the Beacon brand folder now - check for the invite. First round of concepts looked strong on the call. The leadership note: lean warmer on the palette, less cool grey. Marcus will own day-to-day feedback from here.

Thanks,
Diane
subject: RE: Beacon private-label refresh - kickoff follow-up

body_preview:
Hi Laura,

Picking up from Diane. The warmer direction is right - the terracotta and sand pairing reads exactly how leadership described the line. Two notes for round two: the secondary mark needs to hold up at small sizes on packaging, and can we see the wordmark with an ampersand variant? Files in the Box folder when ready.

Marcus
subject: Round 2 notes - Beacon private-label

body_preview:
Hi Marcus,

Ampersand variant is a fun one - I'll show two weights. I'll also rework the secondary mark so it survives at 8mm on a label. Uploading round two to Box by Thursday. The terracotta and sand set is my favorite too.

Laura
subject: RE: Round 2 notes - Beacon private-label

body_preview:
Hi Laura,

Invoice INV-2026-014 is approved and scheduled for payment on net-30 terms. Please confirm your remittance details are still the Huntington business account ending in the digits we have on file. Reach out with any questions.

Regards,
Karen Doyle
Accounts Payable, Beacon Retail Group
subject: Invoice INV-2026-014 approved

body_preview:
Hi Karen,

Confirmed, remittance details are unchanged. Thanks for the quick turnaround on the approval.

Laura
subject: RE: Invoice INV-2026-014 approved

body_preview:
Hi Laura,

Following up on the final brand kit handoff. Leadership signed off on everything - lovely work. I've moved the master files into the Box archive folder and shared the link with the packaging vendor. We'd love to keep you on a small retainer for collateral through 2027. Let's talk in the new fiscal year.

Best,
Diane
subject: Brand kit signed off - retainer for 2027?

body_preview:
Hi Diane,

That means a lot - thank you. A collateral retainer sounds great. I'll send a proposal once the dust settles after the holidays. Glad the vendor has the masters cleanly.

Laura
subject: RE: Brand kit signed off - retainer for 2027?

body_preview:
Hi Laura,

We'd love to have you teach a hand-lettering workshop in the fall session. We're thinking a Saturday afternoon, twelve seats, materials provided by the participants. Our standard split works out to seventy-five dollars a seat. Would November 21 work for your calendar?

Warmly,
Rebecca Foley
Dearborn Community Arts Center
subject: Fall hand-lettering workshop at the CAC

body_preview:
Hi Rebecca,

November 21 works beautifully - put me down. Twelve seats at seventy-five is right. I'll bring brush pens for anyone who needs one and send a supply list a week out. Could you have my mom from your bookkeeping side flag me the room setup details?

Thank you,
Laura
subject: RE: Fall hand-lettering workshop at the CAC

body_preview:
Hi Laura,

The Beacon folder has the latest packaging dielines uploaded. Could you drop your hand-lettered seasonal banner artwork into the same folder when it's ready? We want the print vendor pulling from one source of truth.

Thanks,
Marcus
subject: Packaging dielines + seasonal banner art

body_preview:
Hi Marcus,

Dielines look clean. I'll deliver the seasonal banner artwork as layered files and flattened proofs into the same Box folder by end of week, named with the version date so the vendor never grabs the wrong one.

Laura
subject: RE: Packaging dielines + seasonal banner art

body_preview:
Hi Laura,

Quick coordination note - the Beacon brand guidelines PDF needs your final ampersand wordmark embedded before we circulate internally. Priya on my team can compile if you send the vector. No rush, sometime next week is fine.

Marcus
subject: Final wordmark for brand guidelines
